title: Duplicate item and move to board

posts.author: Carly3 (Carly Lindholm)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I am wondering if there is an automation that will duplicate an item and move it to a different board when a due date arrives.

We have our client contact information in one board with due dates and a separate board for current clients due which displays 3 mths of the clients upcoming.

I did try and do a custom automation “when date arrives, duplicate item and move to board” but it didn’t seem to work.

Thanks!
